hero.title: Thoughtful digital design, built with care.
hero.lead: Bentoji is an independent design studio based in Auckland, New Zealand. We help startups, agencies and growing businesses design digital products, websites and brands.

about.heading: Small studio. Direct collaboration. No unnecessary layers.
paragraphs: Bentoji is the independent studio of Ben Nguyen, a digital designer with over a decade of experience creating products, websites and digital experiences across New Zealand and Australia.
After years working with agencies and product teams, Bentoji was created to offer something simpler: working directly with the designer who actually builds the work.
Whether it's designing a new product, improving an existing experience, or creating a brand from scratch, every project stays focused on clarity, usability and thoughtful execution.

items.title: Product Design
items.tagline: From early concepts to polished interfaces, we design products that are intuitive, scalable and enjoyable to use.
paragraphs: Whether you're building an MVP or improving an existing platform, we help simplify complex workflows into experiences people actually understand.

items.title: Website Design
items.tagline: Websites should do more than look good.
paragraphs: We design fast, responsive websites that communicate clearly, convert visitors and are easy to maintain. Whether it's a marketing site, company website or landing page, every decision is made with usability and business goals in mind.

items.title: Brand & Graphic Design
items.tagline: Strong brands are built through consistency.
paragraphs: We help shape visual identities and create supporting design assets that feel cohesive across every touchpoint, from logos and presentations to social graphics and marketing campaigns.

items.title: Editorial & Collateral
items.tagline: Sometimes the most effective communication still happens outside the screen.
paragraphs: We design reports, brochures, annual reports, event materials and other printed or digital publications that make information easier to read and more engaging to explore.

items.title: Independent by choice
items.body: You'll work directly with the designer doing the work, from the first conversation to the final handoff.

items.title: Practical, not flashy
items.body: Design should solve problems, not create them. Every decision balances usability, aesthetics and technical feasibility.

items.title: Cross-disciplinary
items.body: Experience across UX, UI, branding, motion, websites and marketing means ideas stay consistent from concept to launch.

items.title: Built for collaboration
items.body: Comfortable working alongside developers, marketers, founders and product teams, whether joining an existing workflow or leading the design process.

items.title: Discovery
items.body: Understand your goals, audience and constraints before opening Figma.

items.title: Design
items.body: Explore ideas, refine direction and iterate together until everything feels right.

items.title: Build
items.body: Work closely with developers (or build simple websites ourselves) to ensure the final product matches the design.

items.title: Improve
items.body: Launch isn't the finish line. Continue refining based on feedback, analytics and real-world use.

work.heading: A collection of products, websites and digital experiences designed across healthcare, property, technology, finance, events and independent products.

cta.heading: Have something in mind?
cta.body: Tell us about your product, brand or idea. We would love to hear it. We take on a small number of projects at a time.

footer.blurb: Bentoji is an independent design studio based in Auckland, helping businesses create thoughtful digital products, websites and visual identities.
